biological_replicate: Xenopus embryos were obtained and staged as previously described.
technical_replicate: three technical replicas were used within each experiment.
experimental_design: To examine the role of Cx43 in neural crest development, we used antisense morpholino knock-down (Cx43MO).
factor_value: Cx43 promotes neural crest migration via N-cadherin regulation.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
number_of_technical_replicates: three technical replicas were used within each experiment.
number_of_biological_replicates: 10–15 embryos were used for preparation of embryo lysates.
